# OSAllocatedUnfairLock.Ownership

**Enumeration**

An enumeration that represents the ownership status of an unfair lock.

## Declaration

```swift
@frozen enum Ownership
```

## Specifying ownership

- **OSAllocatedUnfairLock.Ownership.owner**: Describes code that owns the lock.
- **OSAllocatedUnfairLock.Ownership.notOwner**: Describes code that doesn’t own the lock.

## Determining lock ownership

- **precondition(_:)**: Asserts if the lock object fails to meet specified ownership requirements.

## Conforms To

- BitwiseCopyable
- Copyable
- Equatable
- Escapable
- Hashable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
